description: CompositionPink T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a V-neck, short sleeves, grunge look graphic print and sequin work on the front FitComfortWash careWash using mild detergentDo not bleachDo not dry in direct sunlightWarm iron; do not iron directly on print/embroideryCustom graphics add to the edgy look in this T-shirt from spykar for women.
